creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Greg Lewis from comment #4)
Reply on an old issue.

I can't reproduce this on 13.4-RELEASE (aarch64) and 14.1-RELEASE (amd64) using openjdk11 11.0.24+8-1.

I'm inclined to close this bug in a couple of days unless new information is added about reproducibility.
